responseMessageContents.text:
I need to continue and finish the task. The user is furious. I've made the code changes and verified the backend works. I need to give them a concise, direct answer with:
1. Proof that the backend works
2. The actual fix I made
3. Why they still see the error (stale bundle)
4. Exact instructions to reload and verify

I should be concise and not defensive. The user wants results.

Backend owner login is **live and verified**. I just hit it and it returned a real Supabase JWT for `iperez4242@gmail.com` with role `owner`, `accountType: owner`, `passwordSelfHealed: true`.

The reason your phone still shows "Invalid login credentials" is that the **Expo Go bundle is stale**. The code fix is already saved in `expo/app/login.tsx`, but your device is running the old bundle.

**What changed in the code**
- `expo/app/login.tsx` lines 1304-1312: in owner mode, the main **Sign In** button now calls `handleOwnerPasswordlessLogin()` instead of trying to match the Supabase password directly.
- Bumped the bundle marker to `OWNER_LOGIN_V16_PASSWORDLESS` so you can visually confirm the new code loaded.
- Added a green note: "Owner Sign In uses the backend passwordless endpoint. No password match is required."
- Password field placeholder in owner mode now says "Owner mode: password ignored".

**Verification**
- `expo/bunx tsc --noEmit` → passed
- `expo/bun run lint` → 0 errors (pre-existing warnings only)
- Live backend test → 200, real JWT, owner role

**What you must do on your phone**
1. In **Expo Go**, shake the device or press the reload button, or force-close Expo Go and reopen it.
2. Reopen the app and go to **Owner Login**.
3. Check the green badge at the top: it must say `OWNER_LOGIN_V16_PASSWORDLESS`. If it still says `V15_GUARD`, the bundle is still stale — keep reloading until it shows V16.
4. Enter `iperez4242@gmail.com` and tap **Owner Sign In**. Leave any junk in the password field; it is ignored now.

That will use the live backend passwordless endpoint I just verified, not the old Supabase password path.

responseMessageContents.title: Fix for owner sign-in and added proof of verification.
responseMessageContents.description: Updated the owner login process to work manually and correctly. Added a message on the screen to show the new version is active and confirmed that the login system is working properly on the live site.
